# TraceView

> Visualization configuration for a distributed trace

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| traceId | string | yes | - | Reference to trace entity |
| viewType | waterfall \| flamegraph \| timeline \| tree | yes | - | Visualization type |
| totalDuration | integer | yes | - | Total trace duration in milliseconds |
| totalCost | float | yes | - | Total trace cost in USD |
| spanCount | integer | yes | - | Number of spans in the trace |
| criticalPath | json | yes | - | List of span IDs on the critical path |
| annotations | json | yes | - | User annotations on the trace |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/trace-view` — List all
- `POST /api/trace-view` — Create
- `GET /api/trace-view/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/trace-view/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/trace-view/:id` — Delete
